title: Super admin protegido contra exclusão

unit_tests.super_admin_test: Não deve soft-deletar um super admin → failure(UserIsSuperAdminError) ✓

business_flow_tests.super_admin_test: Deve retornar 403 ao tentar excluir o super admin → HTTP 403 ✓

rf_019_evidence.mechanism: isProtectedAccount(user, currentUserId) → canDelete = false when user.email === 'admin@admin.com'

notes: FE gate: email-based (user.email === SUPER_ADMIN_EMAIL). AdminUser type lacks isSuperAdmin field → email proxy used instead.
BE gate: entity flag (user.isSuperAdmin). Authoritative source of truth.
Gap: FE could be bypassed if super admin email changes, but BE guard is unconditional — server-side protection holds regardless.
Both layers independently block deletion: FE hides button (RF-019), BE returns UserIsSuperAdminError → 403 (RF-008).
